creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239980
update to 20230207 patch

Update to 20230207. The source file is copied into freebsd.uzsolt.hu/src too.

The changelog is output of "svn log -r '{2021-10-24}':HEAD https://svn.code.sf.net/p/squirrelmail/code/branches/SM-1_4-STABLE/squirrelmail":

------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14934 | pdontthink | 2021-12-07 20:24:43 +0100 (K, 07 dec. 2021) | 1 line

Mild improvement in plugin detection
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14937 | pdontthink | 2022-01-18 09:02:40 +0100 (K, 18 jan. 2022) | 1 line

Happy New Year
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14941 | pdontthink | 2022-03-21 21:00:51 +0100 (H, 21 márc. 2022) | 1 line

Add ability for plugins to request additional header fields in the message list lookup
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14943 | pdontthink | 2022-04-05 04:12:15 +0200 (K, 05 ápr. 2022) | 1 line

Fix deprecation notice when variable is null
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14944 | pdontthink | 2022-04-13 22:08:39 +0200 (Sze, 13 ápr. 2022) | 1 line

Separate DNT and DSN
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14945 | pdontthink | 2022-04-13 23:38:27 +0200 (Sze, 13 ápr. 2022) | 1 line

Add proper RFC 3461 DSN functionality (previously we relied only on the Return-Receipt-To header)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14948 | pdontthink | 2022-04-25 08:08:34 +0200 (H, 25 ápr. 2022) | 1 line

Cause message subject to show in page title when message view is loaded in its own window/tab
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14953 | pdontthink | 2022-05-22 20:40:05 +0200 (V, 22 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Implement SQL identifier quoting in all cases (alleviates issue double-quoting user field under PGSQL, #177)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14955 | pdontthink | 2022-05-22 20:57:29 +0200 (V, 22 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Correct global config name
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14956 | pdontthink | 2022-05-22 22:16:41 +0200 (V, 22 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Add option to folder prefs for marking deleted messages as read
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14958 | pdontthink | 2022-05-23 00:15:28 +0200 (H, 23 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Fix: Login mechanisms other than "login" were broken if server returned untagged data before login response (#2854)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14960 | pdontthink | 2022-05-23 02:19:51 +0200 (H, 23 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Greatly fix the plaintext display of messages that do not have a text part. Patch from Alexey Shpakovsky (#496)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14966 | pdontthink | 2022-05-27 23:25:53 +0200 (P, 27 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Add ability to explicitly set prefs DB connection charset, though usually if database defaults are sensible this is not something to be concerned with in configuring SquirrelMail
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14967 | pdontthink | 2022-05-27 23:26:24 +0200 (P, 27 máj. 2022) | 1 line

Add ability to explicitly set address book DB connection charset, though usually if database defaults are sensible this is not something to be concerned with in configuring SquirrelMail
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14972 | pdontthink | 2022-06-20 04:27:20 +0200 (H, 20 jún. 2022) | 1 line

Restore line incorrectly deleted
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14974 | pdontthink | 2022-06-20 08:06:50 +0200 (H, 20 jún. 2022) | 1 line

Fix PHP notice
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14975 | pdontthink | 2022-06-20 19:15:09 +0200 (H, 20 jún. 2022) | 1 line

Backport fix from DEVEL
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14976 | pdontthink | 2022-06-20 19:19:35 +0200 (H, 20 jún. 2022) | 1 line

Remove use of each()
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14978 | pdontthink | 2022-12-06 12:40:20 +0100 (K, 06 dec. 2022) | 1 line

Fix poorly written timezone parsing
------------------------------------------------------------------------
r14980 | pdontthink | 2023-01-03 02:22:36 +0100 (K, 03 jan. 2023) | 1 line

Happy New Year
------------------------------------------------------------------------
